title: rubus × nigrans
intro: Rubus × nigrans, also known as the blackberry thorn or black-fruited thorn, is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, a group of flowering plants in the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Rubus × nigrans include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Rubus × nigrans can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used depending on the desired health benefit.
